Job Title: AI Engineer (1-2 Years) Company Name: NewAgeSys IT (a division of NewAgeSys) Location: Carnival Infopark, Phase 2, Kakkanad, Ernakulam Job Type: Onsite Shift Timing: 11 AM - 8 PM

About Us

We are a growing technology company with strong foundations in mobile and web development and an established focus on Artificial Intelligence. Our AI team builds intelligent, scalable, and data-driven solutions across multiple domains. As we expand our AI capabilities, we seek a passionate AI/ML Engineer to design, develop, and deploy machine learning solutions that create real value for clients and end users.

Key Responsibilities

  • Design, develop, and deploy AI/ML solutions in Generative AI, Computer Vision, and traditional Machine Learning domains.
  • Build and maintain Generative AI applications (RAG-based systems, AI agents, multi-agent workflows) using frameworks like LangChain, LangGraph, and MCP-compatible architectures.
  • Develop AI systems integrating with external tools, APIs, databases, and enterprise workflows via MCP implementations and tool orchestration.
  • Work with Large Language Models (LLMs) (OpenAI, Gemini, Claude, LLaMA, Mistral, Qwen, DeepSeek) for inference, fine-tuning, and optimization.
  • Design and optimize knowledge retrieval pipelines (embeddings, vector databases, document ingestion, chunking, reranking, contextual retrieval).
  • Develop Computer Vision solutions (image classification, object detection, segmentation, video/image analytics) using OpenCV, PyTorch, TensorFlow.
  • Train, fine-tune, evaluate, and optimize ML/DL/LLM models for production-grade performance.
  • Expose AI/ML services via REST APIs using FastAPI or similar frameworks.
  • Collaborate with frontend, backend, DevOps, and product teams to integrate AI into scalable applications.
  • Deploy, monitor, debug, and optimize AI systems in production environments.
  • Stay updated on advancements in Generative AI, Agentic AI, MCP ecosystems, Computer Vision, and ML research.

Required Skills & Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s/Master’s in Computer Science, AI, Data Science, Engineering, or related fields.
  • 2–3 years of hands-on experience in AI/ML, Deep Learning, Computer Vision, or Generative AI application development.
  • Strong Python proficiency and software engineering best practices.
  • Hands-on experience with Generative AI applications (RAG chatbots, AI assistants, document intelligence, agentic workflows).
  • Practical experience with LangChain, LangGraph, MCP-based integrations, and AI orchestration frameworks.
  • Experience with MCP-compatible tool integrations and connecting AI agents to external systems.
  • Strong understanding of vector databases, embeddings, retrieval pipelines, prompt engineering, and context management.
  • Experience with LLMs/Transformer architectures (hosted APIs and open-source models).
  • ML fundamentals: supervised/unsupervised learning, deep learning, model evaluation, validation.
  • Hands-on experience with PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn.
  • Computer Vision projects: image classification, object detection, segmentation, custom model training.
  • Familiarity with OpenCV and deep learning-based CV models.
  • Experience deploying AI/ML services via FastAPI, REST APIs, or microservices.
  • Knowledge of model deployment, containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), and cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure).
  • Git version control proficiency.

Preferred (Nice to Have)

  • Multi-agent AI systems and advanced agent orchestration (LangGraph).
  • Fine-tuning LLMs, LoRA/QLoRA, inference optimization.
  • Multimodal AI applications (text, image, audio, video processing).
  • Edge AI deployment (NVIDIA Jetson, Raspberry Pi).

Essential Skills

  • Hands-on experience with RAG-based chatbots, GenAI applications, or AI assistants.
  • Practical exposure to Agentic AI systems:
  • Single-agent multi-tool workflows
  • Multi-agent multi-tool orchestration
  • Tool calling and reasoning pipelines
  • AI workflow automation
  • Familiarity with LangChain/LangGraph for agent orchestration, tool integration, workflow management.
  • Computer Vision: Image classification, object detection/segmentation, OpenCV, deep learning-based models.
  • Core ML fundamentals: Supervised learning, regression/classification, tree-based models (Decision Trees, Random Forest, XGBoost).
  • Python + ML/DL frameworks: Strong Python skills, PyTorch/TensorFlow.
  • Model training/fine-tuning: Experience with ML/DL/LLM training, evaluation metrics, validation approaches.

Contact: Share your resume at career@newagesysindia.com if this aligns with your career goals.
summary: AI Engineer (1-2 Years) at NewAgeSys IT develops AI/ML solutions in Generative AI, Computer Vision, and traditional ML. Requires Python, LangChain, and deployment expertise.

job_description:
Senior MERN Stack Engineer — Enterprise SaaS Platform

Location: On-site Type: Full-time Team: Product Engineering

About the Role

Lurny is an enterprise SaaS AI-powered EdTech platform with dynamic routes, multi-tenant architecture, role-based personas, dynamic UI systems, and enterprise access controls. We’re seeking a Senior MERN Engineer with experience building enterprise-grade systems (RBAC, audit logging, tenant isolation, SSO, dynamic UIs) beyond basic CRUD applications. You’ll work on React frontend + Node.js backend, scaling and improving a large codebase while enhancing security, maintainability, and architecture. This role emphasizes architecture improvements, tech debt reduction, and a gradual migration to TypeScript.

What You’ll Do

  • Maintain and scale React 18 + Vite frontend (100+ routes, lazy-loaded, role-gated)
  • Build and harden Node.js + Express + MongoDB backend
  • Improve codebase via refactoring, architectural upgrades, and security hardening
  • Drive migration to TypeScript
  • Design fine-grained access control systems (RBAC, ABAC, feature flags, tenant isolation)
  • Implement audit logging for sensitive actions
  • Build dynamic, permission-aware UIs driven by role, tenant, plan, and feature flags
  • Integrate SSO authentication, Active Directory, OAuth, SAML/OIDC
  • Collaborate with Python AI team on REST + WebSocket APIs
  • Deliver clean, performant, accessible enterprise-grade UIs

Must-Have Skills

React Frontend

  • 4+ years React (Hooks, State/Context management, Suspense, lazy loading)
  • React Router v6 (protected + role-based routing)
  • Redux Toolkit for large-scale state management
  • Vite, TailwindCSS, responsive UI
  • Strong JavaScript (ES6+) and component architecture
  • REST + WebSocket integrations
  • Authentication flows (JWT, OAuth, SSO, SAML/OIDC)
  • Production-grade PWAs (offline handling, caching, service workers)

Node.js Backend

  • 4+ years Node.js + Express
  • MongoDB + Mongoose (schema design, indexing, aggregations)
  • SSO, OAuth, AD, SAML/OIDC integrations
  • File uploads (Multer, S3/GCS)
  • Async workflows, queues, webhooks, inter-service communication
  • API versioning, rate limiting, error handling
  • Security best practices for enterprise systems

Enterprise Access Control (Critical)

  • RBAC with hierarchical roles
  • ABAC (tenant, department, plan, region-based policies)
  • Feature flags & runtime UI gating
  • Audit logging for privileged actions
  • Multi-tenant systems with strict isolation
  • Server-driven UI visibility & permission-aware components
  • Least privilege, separation of duties, secure defaults

AI Coding Tools (Required)

  • Proficient in Claude Code (preferred), Cursor, or Antigravity
  • Critical review of AI-generated code
  • Use AI tools for navigation, refactoring, debugging, and large codebase changes

Nice to Have

  • Azure, Docker, CI/CD
  • Redis, Socket.IO
  • TypeScript experience or migration expertise
  • Claude Design or AI-assisted UI tools
  • SaaS product implementation experience
  • Strong UI/UX intuition and Figma literacy
  • Design systems (shadcn/ui, Radix)
  • Animation libraries (Framer Motion)

Contact: varsha.m@difinitydigital.com
summary: Senior MERN Stack Engineer needed for enterprise SaaS platform. Focus on scaling, security, and architecture with React, Node.js, and TypeScript.

Brief Description

We are seeking a Senior Node.js Backend Developer with 4+ years of experience in Node.js and server-side technologies for a contract role. The ideal candidate will build and maintain scalable, high-performance backend services and APIs, collaborating with clients, stakeholders, frontend developers, and product managers to deliver robust solutions.

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop, maintain, and optimize server-side applications and microservices using Node.js.
  • Design and implement RESTful APIs and integrate them with frontend and third-party systems.
  • Build and manage database schemas, queries, and data models across SQL and NoSQL databases.
  • Ensure backend systems are secure, performant, and scalable.
  • Collaborate with frontend developers to define and document API contracts.
  • Write clean, modular, reusable, and well-documented code.
  • Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve backend and server-side issues.
  • Participate in code reviews and contribute to architectural decisions.
  • Optimize applications for performance, reliability, and security.
  • Stay updated with new technologies and suggest improvements to backend architecture and processes.
  • Prior experience with banking or financial domain projects is preferred.

Preferred Skills

  • 4+ years of professional backend development experience.
  • Strong expertise in Node.js and JavaScript (ES6+).
  • Strong understanding of TypeScript (TS) over JS.
  • Experience with Express.js, Fastify, or similar Node.js frameworks.
  • Knowledge of databases like MongoDB, MySQL, or PostgreSQL.
  • Experience in API design and development (RESTful; GraphQL is a plus).
  • Understanding of microservices architecture and event-driven design.
  • Familiarity with message brokers like RabbitMQ or Kafka.
  • Experience with authentication and authorization (JWT, OAuth2, etc.).
  • Familiarity with testing frameworks (Jest, Mocha, Supertest, etc.).
  • Experience with Git, CI/CD pipelines, and Docker.
  • Exposure to cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) is a plus.
  • Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work in a collaborative environment.
